title: Selection-driven OSS Prepare with reviewable worktree lifecycle

steps.description: Database: add awaiting_review + discarded enum values to project_oss_job_status; add base_sha, branch_name, commit_sha, files_changed_summary to project_oss_job; add rationale to oss_finding; update models.py and IW_AI_Core_Database_Schema.md
Code review: S01 (enum-add-value autocommit pattern, reversibility documented, no dynamic DDL, testcontainer-only migration test, no Python reserved-name collisions)

Skill contract: add rationale field to Finding dataclass, author rationale per check across all 14 check modules, --check repeatable filter in run_make_oss, drop always-try fixes, persist rationale via orch/oss/persistence.py, mirror edits to .claude/skills/iw-oss-publish/
Code review: S03 (rationale quality + coverage, filter correctness, always-try removal complete, mirror sync empty diff, README updated)

CLI --check flag + worker rewrite: move worktree to {working_dir}/.worktrees/oss-prep-<job_id>, capture base_sha, pass --check through, auto-commit on clean exit with branch iw-oss-publish/prep-<job_id>, set awaiting_review without removing worktree, extend concurrency gating
Code review: S05 (worktree lifecycle correctness, base_sha capture, branch naming determinism, no orphan worktree paths, publish/install paths unaffected, concurrency race-free)
API: POST /project/{id}/oss/jobs/{job_id}/accept (squash-merge → main, refuses when main moved) and /discard (idempotent); surface OSS-prep worktrees on /system/worktrees
Code review: S07 (moved-main detection, squash-merge semantics, error recovery leaves worktree for inspection, discard idempotency, worktrees page rendering, logging)

Frontend: rewrite OSS tab — grouped table, filter chips (All/Failing only/MUST only), checkbox rule, 'Prepare fix (N selected)' button, details modal with rationale + OSPS link, confirm dialog, awaiting-review card with Accept/Discard, remove top Prepare button + dead 'Fix via Prepare' links, make css
Code review: S09 (dead elements removed, checkbox rule, modal accessibility, stale-scan disables button, no dynamic Tailwind classes, no regressions on Scan/Publish/SSE, make css produced diff)

Tests: migration, skill rationale+filter, CLI --check, worker awaiting-review lifecycle, accept happy+moved-main, discard happy+idempotent, concurrency gating, stale-UI, template rendering, worktrees page, update existing OSS tests to new JSON body + rationale contract
Code review: S11 (every AC mapped to a test, testcontainer compliance, no mocked DB in integration tests, real git repo for accept/discard tests, tests fail on pre-change code)

Final cross-layer review: AC1-AC15 completeness, JSON body / column / attribute consistency across layers, end-to-end trace for Prepare/Accept/Discard/moved-main, Publish flow unchanged, skill mirror synced, docs updated, CLAUDE.md compliance

QV: Browser verification — table rendering, checkbox rule, filter chips, details modal with rationale + OSPS link, selection + confirm dialog, awaiting-review card, Accept / Discard flows, stale-scan UI gate, /system/worktrees surfacing, no regressions on Jobs / Tests / Scan
